summary: Implemented first-class blocker.md validation in just qd-reports-check, documented the contract, normalized existing done-node blocker files as historical, and captured focused negative smokes for malformed blocker reports.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: just qd-reports-check validates every reports/qd/<node-id>/blocker.md file.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: scripts/qd-report-check/blocker.sh is wired from scripts/qd-reports-check.sh and evidence/m4-qd-blocker-report-contract/qd-reports-check.log records just qd-reports-check passing with blocker report count.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Blocker report paths must map to an existing qd node id in roadmap/qd-export.json.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: scripts/qd-report-check/blocker.sh validates the parent directory node id against roadmap/qd-export.json; blocker-negative-smokes.log records the unknown-node rejection.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Active blocker reports for blocked nodes must include node id, platform, failed command or operation, missing condition, evidence path, and unblock path.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: scripts/qd-report-check/blocker.sh validates active blocked-node Markdown labels and existing evidence/<node-id>/ paths; blocker-negative-smokes.log records missing-command rejection.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Blocker reports for done nodes must explicitly mark themselves superseded or historical so stale blockers cannot look current.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: scripts/qd-report-check/blocker.sh requires Superseded: or Historical: for done-node blockers; existing done-node blocker files were minimally normalized.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Focused negative smokes prove malformed blocker reports are rejected.
Existing blocker reports pass after minimal wording normalization.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-blocker-report-contract/qd-reports-check.log records just qd-reports-check passing after the blocker contract was added.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: No product runtime, capture, encode, transport, decode, render, presentation, cross-device, latency, Mac hardware, workflow dispatch, or live credentials are required.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: This infra-only checker change used qd metadata, shell validation, markdown reports, and local repository checks only.

realWorldValidation.evidence: The node changes only qd report checking, docs, and markdown evidence contracts; no product runtime or external credential validation is required.
